issue_summary: Support source code syntax for arrays in MethodSelector
javadoc_after:
/** * Build the fully qualified method name for the method described by the * supplied class, method name, and parameter types. * *

See {@link #loadMethod(String)} for details on the format. * * @param clazz the class that declares the method; never {@code null} * @param methodName the name of the method; never {@code null} or blank * @param params the parameter types of the method; may be {@code null} or empty * @return fully qualified method name; never {@code null} * @see #loadMethod(String) */
